calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearling this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: David Davenport
LeRoy C. Humpal, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ferguson Enterprises Inc.
Witness for the plaintiff: Trish Funk, Credit Manager.
No appearance by the Defendants: Master's Touch construction; Alan J. Garren individually and as a partner of Master's Touch construcion and Ronald d. Weaver aka Roanld d. Weaver, Jr. aka Ronald S. Weaver, individually and as a partner of Master's Touch Construction.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Ferguson Enterprises Inc. and against the defendants: Master's Touch construction; Alan J. Garren individually and as a partner of Master's Touch construcion and Ronald d. Weaver aka Roanld d. Weaver, Jr. aka Ronald S. Weaver, individually and as a partner of Master's Touch Construction..
Damages of $50,292.07
Attorney's fees of $12,573.01
Costs of $296.00
For the total of $.69960.82
Judgment signed in open court.
